text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, after stepping out to go shopping...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Geez, that shop's selection was super lousy. And none of the colors of thread they had were quite right!
choice_data_list: Hello. Are you out shopping too?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I know you... from the academy! Perfect
timing. Do you know any other craft stores
around here? Take me there at once!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm looking for some thread to fix a frayed spot on my hat, but I can't find anything that'll do the trick!
choice_data_list: Ahh, you mean that precious hat of yours?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! The magical hat that Grandma gave me!
C'mon, let's go already!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. It's not like just any black will do, you
know! It's gotta be a deeeep black brimming with
magical power! Next!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nope! Granny told me this brand's thread gets
damaged wayyy too easily! Moving on! Next!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This continues until, at long last, after visiting
five different stores...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: This is it! This one! The color, thickness, and material are all perfect! Phew! We finally found it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's get stitching right away. I've gotta
restore my hat's magical power as soon as
possible!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is there a park or something around here?
Let's go do it there! C'mon, take me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, here we go! Stitch by stitch, and packing
plenty of magic into each one...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Poke, poke... Prick!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ow!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! This is nothing! It doesn't even hurt
anymore! I'm gonna keep going!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh... It's still a total mess! And I've already
resown it ten times!
choice_data_list:
Why don't you ask someone who's good at
sewing?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: This hat can only be fixed by a witch or a magical girl! That's what Grandma told me long ago.

text_block_list.name: Young Sweep
text_block_list.text:
Daddy! Daddy! My hat's accessory came off! Fix it
pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Granny
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hold on now, Sweepy. Your daddy's about
to head off to work... Besides, it'll take someone
who can wield magic to fix your hat up.

text_block_list.name: Young Sweep
text_block_list.text: What?! Really?! So, so... what should I do?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Granny
text_block_list.text:
You should fix it yourself, of course! Put your
heart into it, one stitch at a time. That's part of
your witch training, too, you know?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...So, that's why I'm doing it myself. No matter
how tough it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing the reason Sweep Tosho's
grandmother encouraged her in that manner was
so she would become a girl who can resolve her
own problems.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Heh, of course she is! ...Anyway! I'm just gonna
keep on sewing over and over until my hat's nice
and pretty again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, she gets back to work. After
hearing her story, I feel like helping her is out of
the question. I still want to do something useful,
though...
choice_data_list: How about watching a video on sewing?
Ahh, imagine if we could fix it faster with magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
A video? Like on UmaTube? ...Hm. You think
that'd help?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, here. Hmm... This is pretty simple to
follow. So I just have to do it like this? I see!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I, I did it! It's totally perfect!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ This stuff's a piece of cake for Magical
Girl Sweepy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But you did help out a little, I guess. As thanks,
I'm gonna cast a good luck spell on you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Here I go! Phalaenopsis Orchid! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her cheerful voice echoes high up into the blue
sky. I feel like something good is going to come
my way!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! That's another way we could do it! Hey,
nice idea!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to use a speed-up spell! Finish in
an instant! Alstroemeria! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! That was super impressive, right? Okay, I'm
gonna get this finished right away!
choice_data_list:
(Good. It looks like that boosted her
motivation.)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I-I did iiiiit!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
My magical power must be off the charts! I can't
believe I got it done in one day!
choice_data_list: That magic spell you cast earlier was incredible.
That magic spell you cast earlier was incredible.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You know it! And the results were fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Leaving aside the matter of whether there was
actually any magic at work, I head back to the
dorm together with a delighted Sweep Tosho.
